[2018-04-30 02:38] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Behemium. Gaussite. Replicase. Energy.

Long ago, the four colors split the color pie in harmony. Then everything changed when the "Gaussite-should-have-flexible-attack" Nation attacked.

Only the Pretend-Piecer, master of all four colors, could stop them. But when the Discord needed him most, he vanished.

A couple weeks passed and my channel and I discovered the new Pretend-Piecer, an energy-overuser named SSP, and although his adding-energy-to-every-unit-cost skills are great, he still has a lot to learn before he's ready to balance anything.

But I believe SSP can balance the game.

[2018-04-30 03:36] http404error: The attentive reader will note that this week's challenge is **Design a unit whose primary purpose is to be sacrificed on defense.**
